name: LSP Bridge
description: Bridge to Language Server Protocol diagnostics — wraps pyright (Python) and typescript-language-server (TS/JS) as a single LspDiagnostics tool the agent can call. Subsumes the dozen language-shell plugins Claude Code ships (pyright-lsp, typescript-lsp, gopls-lsp, …) by exposing one tool that selects the right server per file extension.
author: OpenComputer Contributors
